Meaning:
n. 1. A great mass of ice, earth, or snow mixed with rocks sliding down a mountain.
n. 2. A great amount of something.
n. A heavy snowstorm with strong winds.

v. 1. To invite others to take part in a contest.
v. 2. To cause a person to use a lot of skill or effort.
v. 3. To question or to argue against, especially when something is unfair or unjust.
n. 1. An interesting task or problem; something that takes skill or effort.
n. 2. A call to take part in a contest.

v. 1. To get the better of.
v. 2. To defeat.
n. A deep, narrow opening in rock caused by a split or crack.
adj. Unwisely bold or daring.

v. To tempt or attract with the promise of something good.
n. 1. Something that attracts.
n. 2. Artificial bait used for fishing.

n. A temporary and usually less strong replacement.
adj. Used as a temporary replacement.
n. One who looks at things in the most positive way; a cheerful, hopeful person.
adj. Earlier; happening before.

n. 1. The path that must be followed to get to a place.
n. 2. A fixed course or area assigned to a salesperson or delivery person.

n. 1. The highest part; the top.
n. 2. A conference or meeting of the top leaders of governments.
adj. Short and to the point.
v. To block or defeat the plans or efforts of.
adj. Running straight up and down; upright.
a child whose parents have died
Example: When both of her parents died, she was taken to live in a home for orphans.

Meaning: very pleasing; causing joy
Example: My grandmother tells delightful stories about when she was young.

Meaning: a sudden rush or blast of wind
Example: The gust carried his kite even higher.

Meaning: eager to learn or know
Example: She was curious about how stars were formed.

Meaning: a piece of land planted with fruit or nut trees
Example: We picked apples in the orchard.

Meaning: to feel something is necessary or to be compelled to do something
Example: Their friendship obliged them to help each other.

Meaning: to swing back and forth or from side to side
Example: The fans in the stadium were swaying and chanting the team song.

Meaning: a woody vine that has shiny evergreen leaves and often climbs walls or buildings
Example: The ivy climbed the walls of the old university buildings.

Meaning: to do something to impress others or to attract favorable attention
Example: Tom's little sister is always showing off when his friends come over.

Meaning: not made neat by cutting or clipping
Example: My father had some food caught in his untrimmed beard.
